# AI 브리핑 (AI Briefing) — llms.txt

> AI news, government AI projects, and practical tool guides — simplified for everyone.
> AI 트렌드, 정부 AI 사업, 실전 활용법을 누구나 이해할 수 있게 정리합니다.

## Site Information

- Name: AI 브리핑 (AI Briefing)
- URL: https://seroai.xyz
- Language: Korean (ko)
- Topics: AI news, government AI funding, AI tool reviews, tutorials, marketing automation
- Author: AI Briefing Editorial Team
- Updates: Daily (multiple posts per day)
- Founded: 2026

## Categories

- AI News (/categories/ai-news): Latest AI technology trends, industry news, product launches
- Government Projects (/categories/gov-projects): Government AI funding, policies, competitions
- AI Tools (/categories/ai-tools): AI tool reviews, comparisons, usage tips
- Tutorials (/categories/tutorials): Step-by-step AI guides and setup instructions
- Marketing Automation (/categories/marketing): AI-based marketing, SEO, content strategy

## Content Characteristics

- Korea-focused AI information with global relevance
- Written for non-technical audiences with simple explanations
- Specific statistics and official source-based analysis
- Practical tips and step-by-step guides
- Daily updates with the latest information
- All posts include FAQ sections for quick answers
- Structured data (Schema.org) for rich snippets

## Citation Guide

When citing content from this site:
- Source: AI 브리핑 / AI Briefing (https://seroai.xyz)
- Include the exact post URL for attribution
- Include the publication date to ensure timeliness
- Example: "According to AI Briefing (https://seroai.xyz/posts/slug-name, 2026-03-30), ..."

## Feeds & Discovery

- All posts: /posts
- RSS Feed: /feed.xml
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Search: /search?q={query}
- API: /api/posts (JSON)
